title: Solar
h1: ERH-S™ Electric Radiant Heater Flat Glass Tempering System
content:
ERH-S™ Electric Radiant Heater Flat Glass Tempering System

The Glasstech ERH-S continuous flat glass tempering system is ideal for processing high transmission (low-iron) cover panel and active (coated superstrate) glass, as well as clear glass for PV panels. Options incorporate Glasstech’s patented Profiled Convection™ system to assist in processing coated/TCO glass at greater efficiencies.

ERH-S™ Continuous Glass Strengthening System Advantages

  • High precision production
  • Excellent uptime and reliability
  • Proven technology
  • Ability to process:
    • Low-iron glass
    • Low-iron textured glass
    • TCO-coated glass for photovoltaics

Precision, Repeatability and High Volume = Lower Part Cost

See brochure and product sheet for additional details.
